user_message: Can you work with me on security posture for Fourth Coffee? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
From: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 10:29 EST
Subject: Re: security posture Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with security posture. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: David Rivera <david.rivera@fourthcoffee.com>
Date: 2024-02-25 11:10 EST
Subject: Follow-up: security posture Review

Our team encountered some challenges with security posture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fourth Coffee: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-A trap (Assumes pre-dark opportunity state still valid); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-A failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-A failure mode (Assumes pre-dark opportunity state still valid)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct security posture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-A -- Assumes pre-dark opportunity state still valid
